hero.subtitle: Official open-air public market managed by Tbilisi City Hall
hero.description: Dry Bridge Market (მშრალი ხიდის ბაზარი) is managed and maintained by Tbilisi City Hall. As an important public cultural and tourism landmark in Tbilisi, this market has been an open public space showcasing Georgian history, culture, and local creativity since the early 1990s.
hero.tip: Best on weekends — peak atmosphere & vendors

about.title: About the Market
about.description1: Dry Bridge Market (მშრალი ხიდის ბაზარი) is managed and maintained by Tbilisi City Hall. As an important public cultural and tourism landmark in Tbilisi, this market has been an open public space showcasing Georgian history, culture, and local creativity since the early 1990s.
about.description2: This market is an open-air public flea market in Tbilisi, open all day (recommended operating hours: approx. 11:00 AM – 6:00 PM daily, better atmosphere on weekends). Free admission, no tickets required. Address: PR23+96X, Tbilisi, Georgia (located on the banks of the Mtkvari River, under the Dry Bridge).
